mapper.insert: INSERT INTO groupactivity (activityName, description, budget, actualAmount, creatorID, createTime, settlementTime, isSettable, confirmDeadline, maxMember) VALUES (#{activityName}, #{description}, #{budget}, #{actualAmount}, #{creatorID}, #{createTime}, #{settlementTime}, #{isSettable}, #{confirmDeadline}, #{maxMember})
mapper.update: UPDATE groupactivity SET activityName = #{activityName}, description = #{description}, budget = #{budget}, actualAmount = #{actualAmount}, confirmDeadline = #{confirmDeadline}, maxMember = #{maxMember} WHERE activityID = #{activityID}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM groupactivity WHERE activityID = #{activityID} AND isSettable = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM groupactivity ORDER BY createTime DESC

SELECT * FROM groupactivity WHERE 1 = 1
AND (activityName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(activityID AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND isSettable = #{isSettable}
ORDER BY createTime DESC
SELECT * FROM groupactivity WHERE creatorID = #{creatorID} ORDER BY createTime DESC
SELECT ga.* FROM groupactivity ga INNER JOIN activitymember am ON ga.activityID = am.activityID WHERE am.memberID = #{memberID} ORDER BY ga.createTime DESC
